name: Cadets
description_short: Cadets is a resort wear and fashion e-commerce retailer selling iconic beachwear, shorts, and vacation-themed clothing with international shipping and free delivery over $200.
description_long: Cadets operates as an online fashion and apparel retailer specializing in resort wear and beachwear products. The company markets itself around vacation lifestyle imagery and iconic resort destinations, featuring collections centered on shorts and warm-weather clothing with seasonal campaigns like "Spring/Summer 2026." The website indicates global reach with multi-currency and multi-country support, suggesting an international customer base. Cadets appears to be a traditional e-commerce fashion brand with no apparent financial services component. The website content consists entirely of product marketing for resort wear, seasonal collections, and shipping promotions. There is no evidence of any payday lending, credit alternatives, emergency loans, or financial services offerings on the provided website. The current categorization as a "payday-alternative" is factually incorrect based on all available website content. Cadets should be recategorized as a fashion/apparel retailer or, if forced into available categories, as a credit-card issuer only if they offer a branded credit card—though no such product is evident from the website provided. This appears to be a significant data error in the CreditDoc database.
services: Online resort wear and beachwear retail
pros: Global shipping to 195+ countries and territories
Seasonal collections with timely resort wear offerings
Established online storefront with professional website infrastructure
cons: No financial services or lending products offered despite payday-alternative categorization
Website content provides minimal product detail or company background information
No visible customer service or support contact information on homepage
Category miscategorization creates consumer confusion and unreliable data
best_for: International travelers seeking vacation and resort wear
Consumers shopping for seasonal beachwear and warm-weather clothing
Customers preferring global e-commerce retailers with multi-currency checkout
diagnosis: Cadets is a fashion e-commerce retailer with zero connection to financial services, lending, or payday alternatives. This company should not be listed in the consumer finance database and appears to be miscategorized due to a database error. CreditDoc requires immediate recategorization or removal of this profile.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
